title: Another, At Chester (Epigrams On Windows)
content:
The church and clergy here, no doubt,
        Are very near a-kin;
    Both weather-beaten are without,
        And empty both within.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another, At Chester (Epigrams On Windows)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
